'''鈭歮-w-ch-z''' ('''kamawchezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wainscot|wainscot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wainscot|wainscot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-w-ch-z
|-
! Lemma
| kamawchezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimawchezoko|thimawchezoko]] || [[word:jimawchezoko|jimawchezoko]] || [[word:shimawchezoko|shimawchezoko]] || [[word:kimawchezoko|kimawchezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumawchezoko|thuthumawchezoko]] || [[word:jujumawchezoko|jujumawchezoko]] || [[word:shushumawchezoko|shushumawchezoko]] || [[word:kukumawchezoko|kukumawchezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mawchezoko|th忙mawchezoko]] || [[word:j忙mawchezoko|j忙mawchezoko]] || [[word:sh忙mawchezoko|sh忙mawchezoko]] || [[word:k忙mawchezoko|k忙mawchezoko]]
|-

|-

|}
